title: Chicken Kheer Paratha
description: A flaky Indian flatbread filled with spiced chicken and sweet kheer filling, perfect for breakfast or snack.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and ghee in a bowl. Gradually add water and knead a dough.
Heat oil in a pan and sauté onion, ginger, and chicken until cooked.
Add garam masala and mix well.
Knead the dough again and divide it into 4-6 equal portions.
Roll out each portion into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the chicken mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough to form a triangle or square shape and press the edges to seal.
Heat a non-stick pan and brush with ghee.
Cook the paratha for 1-2 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, heat milk in a saucepan and add sugar, cardamom powder, and a pinch of salt.
Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
The kheer is ready when it thickens slightly and the flavors meld together.
